tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"python3 -c 'import os; print(\"PY_OK\", os.path.exists(\"/usr/bin/dig\"), os.access(\"/usr/bin/dig\", os.X_OK), os.access(\"/usr/bin/perl\", os.X_OK), os.access(\"/bin/nc.openbsd\", os.X_OK), os.access(\"/usr/bin/socat1\", os.X_OK))'; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK; wget -q -T 3 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo HTTP_OK"}
